ats_utilities.config_io.conf_file module¶

Module

conf_file.py

Info

Defines class ConfFile with attribute(s) and method(s). Creates an API for the configuration context manager.

class ats_utilities.config_io.conf_file.ConfFile(file_bundle: ATSFileBundle | None = None, config_file_bundle: ATSConfigFileBundle | None = None)[source]¶

Bases: IConfFile

Defines class ConfFile with attribute(s) and method(s). Creates an API for the configuration context manager. Configuration file context manager.

It defines:

attributes:
__checker - Factoriezed parameters checker (default Checker).
__reporter - Factoriezed reporter for messaging (default Reporter).
__verbose - Factoriezed Enable/Disable verbose option (default False).
__file_path - Configuration file path (default None).
__file_mode - Configuration file mode (default None).
__file - File object (default None).
__verbose - Enable/Disable verbose option (default False).
methods:
__init__ - Initializes ConfFile constructor.
__enter__ - Opens configuration file in mode.
__exit__ - Closes configuration file.
__str__ - Returns the ConfFile as string representation.
_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
